entities.name: PEARL MILLET
entities.description: An important cereal crop capable of growing in semi-arid, arid and marginal regions of the world.

entities.name: SEMI-ARID AND ARID REGIONS
entities.description: Geographic areas characterized by low rainfall where pearl millet is grown.

entities.name: DROUGHT
entities.description: A major abiotic constraint affecting pearl millet production globally.

entities.name: LG2 DT QTL
entities.description: A major linkage group 2 drought tolerance quantitative trait locus contributing to hybrid grain and stover yield potential.

entities.name: HYBRID GRAIN AND STOVER YIELD POTENTIAL
entities.description: The potential yield of hybrid grain and stover under terminal drought stress.

entities.name: TERMINAL DROUGHT STRESS
entities.description: Drought stress occurring during the terminal stages of crop growth.

entities.name: FINE MAPPING
entities.description: A genetic method used to narrow down the genomic interval of a QTL.

entities.name: NEAR-ISOGENIC LINES
entities.description: Genetic lines that are identical except for a specific locus of interest.

entities.name: DDRAD
entities.description: Double digest restriction site associated DNA technique used for high-throughput genotyping.

entities.name: SPHI
entities.description: A restriction enzyme used in the ddRAD technique.

entities.name: MLUCI
entities.description: A restriction enzyme used in the ddRAD technique.

entities.name: ILLUMINA HISEQ2500
entities.description: A high-throughput sequencing platform used for genotyping the mapping population.

entities.name: SNPS
entities.description: Single nucleotide polymorphisms used as molecular markers for genetic mapping.

entities.name: SSRS
entities.description: Simple sequence repeats used as molecular markers with known linkage to the LG2 DT QTL.

entities.name: QTL ICIMAPPING 4.1
entities.description: Software used for the construction of the linkage map.

entities.name: LOD THRESHOLD
entities.description: A statistical value used to determine the significance of a QTL.

entities.name: LINKAGE GROUP
entities.description: A group of markers or genes located on the same chromosome.

entities.name: F2 MAPPING POPULATION
entities.description: The second filial generation population used for genetic mapping.

entities.name: H77/833-2-P10
entities.description: A parent line used in the cross to generate the fine mapping population.

entities.name: ICMR 01029-P10
entities.description: A parent line used in the cross to generate the fine mapping population.

relationships.target: HYBRID GRAIN AND STOVER YIELD POTENTIAL

relationships.source: HYBRID GRAIN AND STOVER YIELD POTENTIAL
